name: Hai Lu Seafood Restaurant
address: 133 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Hai Lu Seafood Restaurant. Address at 133 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Hai Lu Seafood is a fresh seafood restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street offering a diverse menu including grilled, steamed, and stir-fried dishes. Seafood is selected on the spot to ensure top freshness and is easy to order for large groups. With its simple sidewalk style and straightforward space, it is ideal for lively group meals. Reasonable prices and consistent quality make it a reliable favorite for diners seeking fresh seafood on Vinh Khanh Street.

name: Ky Kim Beef Hotpot
address: 150 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Ky Kim Beef Hotpot. Address at 150 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Ky Kim Beef Hotpot is a popular fresh beef hotpot restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, famous for signature dishes like vinegar-dipped beef hotpot, Thai-style beef hotpot, and spicy vinegar beef, served with fresh vegetables and seafood toppings. The comfortable seating makes it suitable for families and groups of friends. With average pricing, tender and sweet beef, and rich broth, it is an excellent choice for beef hotpot lovers exploring Vinh Khanh cuisine.

name: Oc Loan Snail Restaurant
address: 168 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Oc Loan Snail Restaurant. Address at 168 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Oc Loan is a classic sidewalk snail restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, well-known for staying open late into the morning. Its extensive menu features stir-fried snails, lemongrass chili snails, fragrant snails, grilled seafood, and many drinking snacks. Extremely affordable prices (many items from 30,000–60,000 VND), easy-to-enjoy flavors loved by the crowd, fresh ingredients, and friendly quick service. The airy space captures the true spirit of Saigon sidewalk drinking culture, perfect for groups gathering for late-night meals and often considered a “must-not-miss” stop when exploring Vinh Khanh cuisine.

name: Pho Lau 825 Shop
address: 189 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Pho Lau 825 Shop. Address at 189 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Pho Lau 825 is a popular, affordable offal and drinking snack shop in the Vinh Khanh area, famous for beef offal, spicy pork offal, offal baguette, and grilled pork intestines. The simple yet tasty menu is perfect for light bites or casual drinking. With its quick sidewalk style and casual space, it attracts many local customers. The dishes deliver bold street-food flavors at very cheap prices (around 50,000–150,000 VND), making it ideal for late-night meals or a quick stop while exploring Vinh Khanh cuisine.

name: Hong Nhung Snail Restaurant
address: 203 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Hong Nhung Snail Restaurant. Address at 203 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Hong Nhung Snail Restaurant is a long-established snail spot on Vinh Khanh Street, popular for signature dishes like salted chili fragrant snails and green crab claws. It offers a friendly sidewalk atmosphere with simple, comfortable seating. The food delivers consistent fresh flavors at reasonable prices, making it suitable for small groups wanting a relaxed evening of snails and light drinks.

name: Oc 662 Snail Restaurant
address: 377 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Oc 662 Snail Restaurant. Address at 377 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Oc 662 specializes in fresh snails and grilled/stir-fried seafood in a sidewalk style that combines family dining and casual drinking. The menu focuses on easy-to-eat, flavorful dishes using fresh ingredients, perfect for large groups. It offers more spacious seating than many nearby spots, providing a comfortable experience for bigger parties or longer stays. Affordable prices, consistent quality, and often crowded on weekends make it a popular choice on Vinh Khanh Street.

name: Be Oc Fresh Seafood
address: 456 Ben Van Don, Ward 13, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Be Oc Fresh Seafood. Address at 456 Ben Van Don, Ward 13, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Be Oc is a familiar fresh seafood restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, specializing in carefully selected snails and clams that are simply prepared to retain maximum freshness. The menu is concise and easy to choose from, ideal for quick meals or small groups. With its casual sidewalk setting and simple space, it offers a welcoming, homey atmosphere. Affordable prices and fresh flavors make it a perfect stop for diners seeking quality fresh seafood without fuss while exploring Vinh Khanh Food Street.

name: 79K Hotpot & Grill Buffet
address: 414 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is 79K Hotpot & Grill Buffet. Address at 414 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. 79K Hotpot & Grill Buffet is an affordable all-you-can-eat hotpot and grill restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street priced at just 79,000 VND per person. It serves a combination of seafood, grilled meats, and hotpot in a simple, fun model perfect for large groups. With a casual, cheerful atmosphere and spacious seating, it is especially popular with young people and students. The food offers consistent flavors with fresh ingredients and quick service, making it an excellent budget-friendly choice for friends or anyone wanting to enjoy hotpot and grill while exploring Vinh Khanh without breaking the bank.

name: Dao Snail Drinking Restaurant
address: 271 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Dao Snail Drinking Restaurant. Address at 271 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Dao Snail Drinking Restaurant specializes in fresh snails and seafood for casual drinking, standing out with bold-flavored dishes like stir-fried Dao snails, lemongrass snails, and grilled snails. The lively sidewalk drinking atmosphere makes it ideal for friend gatherings. Spacious seating is comfortable for larger groups. Dishes offer strong flavors at affordable prices, making it a familiar local favorite for enjoying snails and light drinking on Vinh Khanh Street.

name: Sea Fish Grill Restaurant
address: 213 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Sea Fish Grill Restaurant. Address at 213 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Sea Fish Grill Restaurant specializes in fresh grilled seafood, offering various preparations such as salted chili grilled fish, scallion oil grilled fish, and many other grilled seafood dishes. The food delivers rich oceanic flavors with fresh ingredients that are easy to enjoy. In its simple sidewalk setting, it is suitable for casual group drinking sessions. Affordable prices and bold, tasty flavors make it a regular stop for diners wanting to enjoy grilled fish and seafood on Vinh Khanh Street.

name: A Min Fish Hotpot
address: 495 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is A Min Fish Hotpot. Address at 495 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. A Min Fish Hotpot is a Western-style specialty fish hotpot restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, renowned for signature dishes like snakehead fish hotpot, field-caught snakehead, and spicy-sour basa fish hotpot, served with characteristic Mekong vegetables such as bitter greens and water lily stems. The broth is naturally sweet with a rustic flavor, easy to enjoy. The casual sidewalk-family setting with airy space makes it suitable for large groups. Affordable prices and authentic Mekong taste make it a great option to change flavors while exploring Vinh Khanh cuisine.

name: Oc Van Snail Restaurant
address: 453 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Oc Van Snail Restaurant. Address at 453 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Oc Van is a typical sidewalk snail restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, specializing in fresh stir-fried snails, lemongrass chili snails, grilled snails, and affordable seafood. With simple outdoor tables and chairs, it is often busy in the evenings and perfect for casual drinking sessions with friends. The flavors are consistent with fresh ingredients, and prices are considered soft compared to the area (around 100,000–200,000 VND per person). Although it may not have as many detailed reviews as bigger spots, Oc Van remains a familiar local choice for quick, convenient, and budget-friendly snail meals.

name: Vinh Khanh Night Snails
address: 341 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Vinh Khanh Night Snails. Address at 341 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Vinh Khanh Night Snails specializes in late-night dining, featuring quick-prepared fresh snails and seafood such as stir-fried snails and grilled snails with scallion oil. The lively sidewalk nighttime drinking atmosphere with outdoor seating attracts many customers during late hours. Dishes deliver bold, easy-to-enjoy flavors at affordable prices, making it perfect for groups of friends gathering for midnight snacks or casual drinking while exploring Vinh Khanh Food Street at night.

name: Co Hai Crispy Chicken Rice
address: 235 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Co Hai Crispy Chicken Rice. Address at 235 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Co Hai Crispy Chicken Rice is a beloved rustic chicken rice stall in the Vinh Khanh food street. The signature dish is crispy chicken rice with golden, crunchy skin, juicy and tender meat, served with garlic chili fish sauce and fragrant rice. The simple sidewalk setting is always crowded, especially in the evenings, with long queues. Extremely affordable prices (around 35,000–60,000 VND per portion) and addictive crispy, flavorful taste make it a favorite for a satisfying meal after strolling or for late-night supper while exploring Vinh Khanh.

name: Thai Sukiyaki Hotpot
address: 252 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Thai Sukiyaki Hotpot. Address at 252 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Thai Sukiyaki Hotpot is a Thai-style hotpot restaurant with signature spicy and aromatic broth, featuring sets such as seafood sukiyaki, beef, or Thai mixed with fresh toppings like shrimp, squid, and clams. The broth has a distinct sour-spicy flavor that warms the stomach perfectly for late-night meals. With covered seating that is more comfortable than typical sidewalk spots, it is suitable for families and groups of friends. Average pricing (around 200,000–350,000 VND per person), fresh ingredients, and authentic Thai taste make it a worthwhile choice when exploring nighttime dining on Vinh Khanh Street.

name: Oc Phat Snail Restaurant
address: 326 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Oc Phat Snail Restaurant. Address at 326 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Oc Phat is a familiar sidewalk snail and seafood restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, specializing in a variety of fresh snail dishes such as tamarind stir-fry, garlic butter stir-fry, and grilled snails. The lively street-style atmosphere with simple tables and chairs makes it suitable for late-night meals or casual drinking. Dishes are well-reviewed for being tasty, easy to eat, and served quickly at affordable prices, making it a reliable local favorite in the area.

name: Thy Thy Grilled Snakehead Fish
address: 296 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Thy Thy Grilled Snakehead Fish. Address at 296 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Thy Thy Grilled Snakehead Fish specializes in the classic Mekong Delta rustic dish – whole grilled snakehead fish, served with salt chili and sweet-sour tamarind dipping sauce. The fish is grilled intact to preserve its natural fragrant flavor, true to countryside cuisine. With a simple, rustic sidewalk setting, it is suitable for light meals or casual drinking with friends while strolling Vinh Khanh Street. Affordable prices and authentic Mekong taste make it a great local spot.

name: 79 Grill Restaurant
address: 360 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is 79 Grill Restaurant. Address at 360 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. 79 Grill Restaurant is a budget-friendly sidewalk grill stall offering a diverse menu of grilled meats, seafood, and vegetables. The items are well-marinated with bold flavors and easy to enjoy, perfect for late-night meals or casual drinking. With its simple street-style setting, it is often busy in the evenings. Very affordable prices make it a familiar, wallet-friendly choice for diners wanting quick and tasty grilled food while exploring Vinh Khanh Street.

name: Co Ut Grill
address: 435 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Co Ut Grill. Address at 435 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Co Ut Grill is a familiar seafood and meat grill restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, popular for grilled sea fish and grilled pork belly. Fresh ingredients are simply grilled to highlight their natural flavors. With a cozy sidewalk-family style and compact space, it offers a friendly, intimate atmosphere. Reasonable prices, delicious fresh food, and warm service make it suitable for light dinners or small, intimate gatherings.

name: Tien Len Grilled Pork Belly
address: 523 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Tien Len Grilled Pork Belly. Address at 523 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Tien Len Grilled Pork Belly is a popular drinking restaurant specializing in crispy grilled pork belly, a classic dish often ordered with beer during friend gatherings. The pork belly is grilled to golden perfection, maintaining a crispy yet chewy texture with light spicy seasoning that pairs perfectly with drinks. The lively sidewalk drinking atmosphere and comfortable space make it suitable for groups. Affordable prices and easy-to-order menu make it a regular stop for evening meals or casual drinking on Vinh Khanh Street.

name: Oc Bui Snail Restaurant
address: 180 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Oc Bui Snail Restaurant. Address at 180 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Oc Bui is a popular budget-friendly snail restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, famous for its signature dish – crab claws stir-fried with salted water, which has made the restaurant well-known. The menu focuses on stir-fried snails, lemongrass chili snails, and grilled ribs as perfect drinking companions. With a comfortable sidewalk style and simple space, it opens from afternoon until around 1 AM, making it a favorite spot for late-night gatherings. Dishes deliver bold flavors with fresh ingredients at very affordable prices (snails around 40,000–60,000 VND per dish). It is often praised as “cheap but quality” compared to other spots in the area.

name: Sau No Fresh Seafood
address: 123 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Sau No Fresh Seafood. Address at 123 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Sau No Fresh Seafood is a renowned seafood restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street with two branches, beloved by many diners for its high-quality fresh live seafood. Signature dishes include velvet snails, len snails, and garlic butter grilled lobster, prepared simply to preserve their natural sweetness. The restaurant features a lively, bustling sidewalk vibe, especially vibrant in the evenings. Prices are slightly above average, but well worth it for the exceptional freshness and quality. Thanks to its delicious flavors and long-standing reputation, it is frequently recommended as one of the must-try seafood spots on Vinh Khanh Food Street.

name: Vinh Khanh Snail
address: 474 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Vinh Khanh Snail. Address at 474 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Vinh Khanh Snail is a traditional snail restaurant well-known to many diners, featuring specialties like coconut stir-fried wool snails and grilled big snails with fresh seafood. It blends sidewalk drinking culture with family dining, offering a rustic, easy-to-enjoy menu suitable for various customers. Dishes are flavorful and delicious at budget-friendly prices. The space is simple yet clean and comfortable, ideal for both young people and families wanting to experience Vinh Khanh street food.

name: Toan & Ky Goat Hotpot
address: 506 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Toan & Ky Goat Hotpot. Address at 506 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Toan & Ky Goat Hotpot is a popular specialty goat hotpot restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, famous for signature dishes such as rare goat hotpot, grilled goat, sliced goat, stir-fried goat, and rustic grilled goat. The menu focuses on hot, flavorful goat dishes that are easy to share in large groups. With a casual drinking-and-family style and covered seating, it offers a comfortable space for long gatherings. Average pricing (around 200,000–400,000 VND per person), with fresh, tender, and aromatic goat meat, makes it an excellent choice for groups and goat lovers enjoying late-night meals on Vinh Khanh.

name: Chilli Hotpot & Grill
address: 463 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Chilli Hotpot & Grill. Address at 463 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Chilli Hotpot & Grill is a self-serve hotpot and grill restaurant popular among young people on Vinh Khanh Street. Signature items include grilled seafood, sour-spicy tamarind hotpot, crispy fried rice, spicy chicken, and grilled ribs, offering a diverse and easy-to-choose menu for groups. The modern sidewalk style with covered seating creates a lively atmosphere, often crowded with young customers. Affordable prices (around 150,000–300,000 VND per person) with bold, spicy flavors that many describe as addictive. Some tamarind hotpots have a distinct sour note that can be adjusted to taste, but overall quality is consistent and perfect for friend gatherings.

name: An An Hotpot & Grill
address: 391 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is An An Hotpot & Grill. Address at 391 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. An An Hotpot & Grill is a beloved seafood hotpot and grill restaurant on Vinh Khanh Street, highlighted by specialties such as steamed octopus, seafood claypot rice, and salted chicken cartilage. The diverse menu emphasizes fresh ingredients and is easy to order for groups. With its comfortable sidewalk style and airy space, it creates a pleasant environment for long meals. Reasonable prices and consistently fresh, tasty flavors keep it among the favorite dining spots on Vinh Khanh Food Street.

name: Nem Nuong Que Nha Specialty
address: 314 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Nem Nuong Que Nha Specialty. Address at 314 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Nem Nuong Que Nha is a long-standing grilled pork rolls restaurant with over 60 years of history, beloved by many diners in District 4. The signature is Nha Trang/Ninh Hoa-style grilled pork rolls served with rice paper, fresh herbs, and rich fermented fish sauce, alongside aromatic whole grilled rolls with authentic Central Vietnam flavors. The clean, airy sidewalk-family setting creates a comfortable dining experience. Affordable prices (around 45,000–100,000 VND per portion), fresh and non-greasy flavors, and consistent quality have earned it a spot among the best nem nuong restaurants in District 4. Perfect for light meals with friends or family.

name: Oc Oanh Snail & Seafood
address: 288 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City
description: The restaurant name is Oc Oanh Snail & Seafood. Address at 288 Vinh Khanh Street, Ward 8, District 4, Ho Chi Minh City. Oc Oanh is one of the most famous snail and seafood restaurants on Vinh Khanh Food Street, operating for over 20 years and awarded Michelin Guide Bib Gourmand 2024. It stands out with signature dishes such as salted chili grilled crab claws, fragrant snails, scallops grilled with scallion oil, oyster porridge, and a rich selection of fresh live seafood prepared in various styles from grilling to stir-frying. The lively sidewalk setting with outdoor seating perfectly captures Saigon street drinking culture and is always packed from early evening until late night. Flavors are bold and fresh with generous portions. Prices are higher than average in the area (around 150,000–400,000 VND per person), but widely regarded as worth it for the quality and reputation.
